message:
fix: surface error details from swallowed catch blocks in useDependencies (#3731)

Capture specific error messages from both the REST API and agent
fallback attempts so that when both fail, the error state includes
actionable details (e.g. "REST API: REST 503; Agent: timeout").
Previously, catch blocks only logged to console.warn without
propagating context to the UI-facing error state.

Closes #3727

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
